summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of CertHub auth, favorites, AI search, and full user journeys. All critical flows working end-to-end.
passed: POST /api/auth/register with unique email returns user object (id/email/name/role) + sets access_token+refresh_token cookies (HttpOnly, Secure)
POST /api/auth/login admin@certhub.com / Admin@2026 returns admin user + cookies (HTTP 200)
POST /api/auth/login wrong password returns 401 with 'Invalid email or password'
GET /api/auth/me with cookie returns admin user (200); without cookie returns 401 'Not authenticated'
POST /api/auth/logout returns {ok:true} and clears cookies in real browser (verified: subsequent admin login worked as fresh session)

POST /api/favorites (auth) with slug 'aws-cloud-practitioner' returns {ok:true}; GET /api/favorites returns item; DELETE /api/favorites/aws-cloud-practitioner returns {ok:true}; subsequent GET returns empty items array

POST /api/certificates/ai-search 'CKAD Kubernetes Application Developer' returns full AI-enriched cert with name, vendor, level, price_usd=395, description, videos[3], ai_generated=true, slug='ai-certified-kubernetes-application-developer-ckad'
AI search caching: first call ~9.1s, second call ~0.18s (50x speedup)
Frontend homepage loads: results-count shows '37 certificates', cert-grid renders 37 cards (2 extra due to AI-generated certs from earlier tests)
Frontend search: typing 'AWS' + submit filters to 7 AWS-only cert cards
Frontend cert detail /certificate/aws-cloud-practitioner: cert-detail-name='AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner', cert-detail-price='$100 USD', video-link-0 visible
Frontend register flow: nav-register-btn -> fill form -> register-submit -> redirects to /dashboard with dashboard-hero visible (auto-login on register)
Frontend logout + admin login flow: nav-logout-btn works, /login form accepts admin creds, redirects to /dashboard
Frontend favorite flow: favorite-btn on cert detail adds favorite; nav-dashboard-btn -> dashboard-grid shows 1 saved cert (AWS Cloud Practitioner), dashboard-count = '1'
notes: Spec expected 35 certificates but backend returned 37 — this is because AI-search creates new persisted certs (ai-generated=true) which get added to the directory. Not a bug, expected behavior of the AI enrichment feature.

Logout Set-Cookie uses SameSite=lax without Secure attribute (originals used SameSite=none;Secure). Browsers still replace by (name,domain,path) tuple so real-world logout works fine (verified via E2E). Cosmetic inconsistency only — no user impact.
Two 401 console errors observed transiently right after logout when frontend polls /api/auth/me — expected behavior, not a bug.
